title: IIT Delhi is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Delhi is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
